Welcome to HAPPY BOARDING SCHOOL!

Happy Boarding School, established in 2044 BS (1988 AD) in Bagar, Pokhara, has now nelocated to 12 – Shiva Marga, Masbar, Pokhara-7, Nepal. As a pioneering institution dedicated to digital education and social transformation, we are committed to equipping students with 21st-century skills through smart teaching methodologies and holistic learning approaches.

We integrate cutting-edge educational technology to foster interactive and engaging learning experiences. With Smart Boards in all classrooms, digital resources, and an air-conditioned computer lab, we ensure that students are well-prepared for the digital era. Our American-style management system further enhances efficiency, ensuring a structured yet dynamic learning
environment.
